Columns.Name: 付保_付保申請待ち件数
付保_証明書申請待ち件数
付保_証明書納品待ち件数
付保_キャンセル申請待ち件数

ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.application_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "付保_付保申請待ち件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.certificate_application_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "付保_証明書申請待ち件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.certificate_delivery_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "付保_証明書納品待ち件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.cancel_application_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "付保_キャンセル申請待ち件数"
   FROM (t_object_insurance main
     JOIN m_insurance_status sub ON ((main.insurance_status_id = sub.insurance_status_id)))
  WHERE ((main.active_flg = 1) AND ((sub.application_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.certificate_application_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.certificate_delivery_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.cancel_application_wait_flg = 1)));
